content:
────────────────────────
9. Continuity and Self-Containment

This specification is designed to be self-sufficient. A new AI, given:

The current versions of this specification.
The environment variables $OS_ROOT, $ARCHIVE_ROOT, $PROMPT_ROOT, $REPO_ROOT, $ORG_ID, $AUTOMATION_ENGINE.
Permission to read from and write to those roots.

can re-instantiate the creative-operating-system by:

Creating the specified directory skeletons.
Initializing manifest files in $ARCHIVE_ROOT/meta.
Creating foundational prompts in $PROMPT_ROOT aligned with the naming grammar.
Committing initial specs and documentation into $REPO_ROOT/$ORG_ID/os-foundation and $REPO_ROOT/$ORG_ID/docs.
Configuring $AUTOMATION_ENGINE with the event-to-workflow mappings outlined above.

Subsequent runs iterate by consulting $ARCHIVE_ROOT/meta indices, adhering to this naming scheme, and consistently attaching SEAL blocks, thereby turning one-off tasks into chapters of a recursive, evolving MythOS.
